sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n65634" key="meqodeutiko/s" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεθοδ-ευτικός</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ή</itype>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">όν</itype>, <sense id="n65634.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">regular</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0067.tlg001:73" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Agatharch.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">73</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
